compiled_state.author: Claude

comments.author: Iso Tester
comments.body:
IMPLEMENTATION LANDED (code) on branch `feat/gerrit-ci-verified-gate` — 6 commits, 20 files, +1364 lines. All artifacts authored + validated (git-config parse, YAML parse, `bash -n`, `terraform fmt -check` + `terraform validate` pass). NOT yet deployed — deploy/E2E need live AWS/GitHub/Gerrit access (operator).

Per-story commits:
- S1 86fa756e — project.config: Verified label + ACL + submit-req shipped INACTIVE (applicableIf=is:false); ADR-0020; gerrit-aws-setup §6.
- S2 8163cf0d — replication.config: scoped `refs/changes/*` refspec (NOT refs/*, protects refs/meta/config token); ADR-0021.
- S3 300b8c07 — Dockerfile.gerrit (base+Python+g2p, in-container per the plan-review BLOCK fix); materialize-g2p-config.sh (pre-boot, SSM PAT, 0600); ini template; plugins/README (hooks core); ADR-0022.
- S5 e6e5d42c — .github/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml: 3-job g2p shape (clear-vote→build-and-test[reuses test.yml checks]→vote), actions SHA-pinned.
- S4 895c5745 — ssm.tf: /rebar/prod/g2p-github-pat + /rebar/prod/ci-gerrit-ssh-key slots; setup-ci-service-account.sh; g2p-ci-credentials runbook (rotation/retire); ADR-0023 (inbound SSH vote).
- S6 62f56d0c — monitoring_1fa8.tf (g2p_dispatch_errors alarm) + observability.sh metric; two-vote-gate-rollback runbook (back-out + activation + E2E steps); CONTRIBUTING.md two-vote flow.

OPERATOR-PENDING (live access; documented in infra/runbooks/g2p-ci-credentials.md + two-vote-gate-rollback.md):
1. Populate SSM: g2p-github-pat (fine-grained, repo=navapbc/rebar, Actions RW + Contents/Metadata R) + ci-gerrit-ssh-key.
2. Generate CI keypair; run setup-ci-service-account.sh on live Gerrit; register the public key.
3. Set GitHub repo vars GERRIT_SERVER/GERRIT_SSH_USER/GERRIT_KNOWN_HOSTS/GERRIT_URL + secret GERRIT_SSH_PRIVKEY.
4. terraform apply (SSM slots + alarm); confirm SNS subscription.
5. Build/deploy the extended Gerrit image; run materialize-g2p-config.sh pre-boot; enable the `hooks` core plugin.
6. E2E while the gate is still INACTIVE (dispatch→CI→vote-back→recheck→patchset-reset).
7. ACTIVATE: delete `applicableIf=is:false` from project.config + re-push (setup-project.sh) once E2E passes.

Note: `main` is Gerrit-locked, so this lands via Gerrit (refs/for/main), not a GitHub PR — routing TBD with the operator.

Stories left in_progress (assignee claude): closing needs the completion-verifier, which correctly requires deploy/E2E evidence (operator).

comments.author: Iso Tester
comments.body:
LIVE DEPLOY (2026-07-02): epic code landed on main via Gerrit change 141 (MERGED + replicated to GitHub main) — dogfooded the existing LLM-Review gate, incl. remediating a real bot BLOCK (wired g2p materialize + hooks-enable into compose-up.sh). Deployed to the prod box: extended Gerrit image (python3.11 + g2p 0.3.1) built + running, hooks plugin enabled, g2p config materialized from SSM, project.config (Verified label + ACL + INACTIVE submit-req) pushed to refs/meta/config, replication.config broadened to refs/changes/*. Provisioned: SSM secrets (g2p-github-pat, ci-gerrit-ssh-key), GitHub repo vars + GERRIT_SSH_PRIVKEY secret, and the rebar-ci-bot Gerrit service account (SSH-auth verified).

E2E BLOCKED by an external g2p bug: on patchset-created the g2p hook fires but crashes in gerrit_to_platform/helpers.py:191 get_change_id — its regex '.*~.*~(I.*)' expects project~branch~I<hash>, but Gerrit 3.14.1 passes change='rebar~142' (project~number) -> IndexError -> no workflow_dispatch -> no Verified vote. So CI does not yet dispatch.

Gate deliberately NOT activated (Verified submit-req stays applicableIf=is:false) — activating with a broken voter would block all submits. LLM-Review gate unaffected/working. NEXT: fix the g2p change-id incompatibility (upgrade/patch g2p or adjust the Gerrit hook change-id format), re-run E2E, THEN activate. Infra + PR #116 otherwise complete.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Two-vote gate DELIVERED + proven live 2026-07-02, and ACTIVATED. All 6 stories closed (S1/S2 with signed completion-verifier attestations; S3-S6 force-closed — their remaining criteria are runtime operator actions not repo-auto-verifiable: GitHub vars/secret set, live deploy, back-out). Live E2E recorded in infra/runbooks/two-vote-gate-rollback.md C.1: change 162 fired BOTH LLM-Review + g2p->Verified+1 on one event; Verified vote-back carried the run URL; recheck re-ran; new patchset reset Verified (copyCondition); gate activated (refs/meta/config, applicableIf removed); change 168 required + earned BOTH votes, merged + replicated to origin/main 1d7caf129. Effective gate now: label:LLM-Review=MAX AND label:Verified=MAX AND -has:unresolved.". Session: 8048b72a1.

compiled_state.description:
# Add CI as a second Gerrit gate vote (`Verified`) via gerrit-to-platform → GitHub Actions

## Context
The v1 code gate (epics d251 infra + b744 code-review, both closed) uses a SINGLE
deterministic vote: the Gerrit `LLM-Review` label, cast by the review-bot's four-pass
blocker. The intended end state requires BOTH (a) LLM review AND (b) CI (build / test /
lint / typecheck) to pass. This epic adds the second, independent vote — the Gerrit
`Verified` label — cast by CI.

**This runs against the LIVE Gerrit-gatekeeper topology** (Gerrit owns `main`; GitHub is a
locked, read-only mirror). It is a **proof-of-concept** that mechanically proves the
review/signing/gate flow with a real, independent CI vote — used by 1–2 developers on one
project, with agentic development producing frequent commits.

### Decision log (2026-07-01 brainstorm — grounded in prior art + verified)
- **Runner = GitHub Actions**, reusing the existing `.github/workflows/test.yml` checks. The
  rebar GitHub repo is **public**, so Actions is free (incl. macOS) and the run page is a
  **zero-auth, contributor-viewable log surface** — satisfies "clients can view logs" at no cost.
- **Integration = adopt `gerrit-to-platform` (g2p) WHOLESALE**, the LF RelEng Gerrit→GitHub-
  Actions bridge, exactly as ONAP / O-RAN-SC / OpenDaylight / FD.io deploy it (~96 repos carry
  a `gerrit-verify.yaml`) — the only mature, production-proven pattern for this integration. A
  bespoke hybrid was **explicitly rejected** (Frankenstein). Jenkins+Checks and Zuul are
  faithful but presuppose a standing CI fleet for multi-repo scale we don't have — rejected.
- **The CI `Verified` vote is an authenticated Gerrit label vote** (service account over SSH),
  NOT a per-vote HMAC attestation.
- **Verified facts (no longer open):**
  - `hooks` / `replication` / `webhooks` are Gerrit **core plugins** — bundled in `gerrit.war`,
    enabled via `init --install-plugin` or copy-from-war; **NO external download / sha256 pin**
    (that discipline is only for the non-core `events-log` / `oauth`).
  - `lfreleng-actions/gerrit-review-action` `vote-type` vocabulary = `clear|success|failure|
    cancelled`; `clear` → `--label Verified=0` (resets to 0; also zeroes `Code-Review`, harmless
    as that label is disabled on this project). `success→+1`, `failure|cancelled→-1`.
- **Two entailed posture changes accepted** (g2p production standard; the ADRs are reconsiderable):
  1. **Broaden replication to change refs** — **reversal of ADR-0010**. **NOT wildcard `refs/*`**
     (that would replicate `refs/meta/config`, which embeds the webhook token — ADR-0010/0014
     keep it off GitHub): use a **scoped** `refs/changes/*:refs/changes/*` refspec alongside
     existing lines, `replicatePermissions = false` retained, `refs/meta/*` excluded.
     `checkout-gerrit-change-action`'s `gerrit-url` fallback covers replication lag.
  2. **Inbound GitHub→Gerrit SSH vote path** — a Gerrit service account whose private key is a
     GitHub Actions secret; the workflow SSHes into Gerrit (29418) to cast `Verified`.
- **Runtime placement (decided): g2p runs INSIDE the Gerrit container** via an extended image
  (`FROM gerritcodereview/gerrit:3.14.1` + Python ≥3.11 + `pip install gerrit-to-platform`).
  Rationale: the `hooks` plugin execs `$site/hooks/*` **from inside the container**, so the hook
  scripts' Python interpreter MUST live in the container — a host-side g2p (with hooks symlinked
  into the bind-mounted `$site/hooks/`) is broken, because the container process cannot resolve a
  host interpreter path. Consequence: the PAT flows via the **existing container-secret path**
  (`fetch-secrets.sh` → compose `.env` → container env), NOT a host-side materialization hack.

## Locked design (the g2p production pattern)
- **Trigger:** g2p Gerrit `hooks` (`patchset-created` / `comment-added` / `change-merged`)
  `workflow_dispatch` a `.github/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml` with the nine `GERRIT_*` inputs.
  Single repo → no org `.github` "magic repo"; a local, non-`required` workflow.
- **Workflow = fixed 3-job shape**, all actions SHA-pinned:
  1. `clear-vote` → `gerrit-review-action vote-type: clear` (Verified→0; GerriScary-safe reset),
     then a short `sleep` for replication.
  2. `build-and-test` → `checkout-gerrit-change-action` (fetch the exact `GERRIT_REFSPEC`) then
     **our existing `test.yml` steps** (lint / typecheck / test matrix incl. macOS + module-size
     / prompt-index / criteria-routing gates + coverage floor).
  3. `vote` (`if: always()`) → `im-open/workflow-conclusion` then `gerrit-review-action
     vote-type: ${{ WORKFLOW_CONCLUSION }}` → `Verified` +1/-1, **run URL in the vote message**.
- **Gate:** new `[label "Verified"]` (NoBlock, ±1, `copyCondition = changekind:NO_CODE_CHANGE`
  mirroring `LLM-Review`) + `[submit-requirement "Verified"] submittableIf = label:Verified=MAX`;
  voting restricted to Service Users. Final gate:
  `label:LLM-Review=MAX AND label:Verified=MAX AND -has:unresolved`.
- **Re-run:** g2p `recheck` ChatOps (`comment-added` → `verify`); a new patchset auto-cancels the
  prior run (`concurrency: cancel-in-progress`). The g2p hook should **retry** transient
  `workflow_dispatch` failures; a persistent failure leaves `Verified=0` (fail-closed) AND alerts.
- **Fail-closed = surfaced block, not silence:** any dropped hook / failed run yields no `+1` ⇒
  no submit, and raises the S6 alarm.

### GerriScary-safe non-negotiables (CVE-2025-1568)
Required together: patchset-scoped vote (tested refspec) + `copyCondition` reset on real code
change + `clear-vote` reset at run start + `Verified` votable only by the CI service account +
submit requirement keyed on the current patchset.

## Secrets & credentials (infra invariant — no plaintext)
New credentials: the **g2p GitHub PAT** (used by g2p in the Gerrit container) and the **CI
service-account SSH key** (a GitHub Actions secret used by the workflow to SSH back). Both MUST
follow the SSM-SecureString pattern, adding slots to **`infra/terraform/ssm.tf`**
(`rebar_secret_params`, `ignore_changes=value`). Because g2p now runs **in the container**, the
PAT materializes via the **existing** container-secret path — `infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh`
already writes `infra/compose/.env` (consumed as container env), so just add the PAT leaf to its
fetched set: no host-side materialization, no plaintext PAT in `gerrit_to_platform.ini` on disk.
The PAT MUST be **fine-grained, single-repo (`navapbc/rebar`)** (Actions r/w, Contents+Metadata r)
— NOT a classic org-wide PAT. Define **rotation + retire** for both (compromise + PoC decommission).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] **S1 — Gate config** (`infra/gerrit/project.config`): add `[label "Verified"]` (NoBlock, ±1,
      `copyCondition = changekind:NO_CODE_CHANGE`) + `[submit-requirement "Verified"] submittableIf
      = label:Verified=MAX`; grant the CI service account's group `label-Verified -1..+1`.
      **Activate the two-vote submit requirement LAST** (after S3–S5 prove the voter) to avoid
      blocking all submits during rollout. Update `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md` (gate section) and
      write the ADR that supersedes/amends **ADR-0013** (gate is now two independent votes).
- [ ] **S2 — Replication broadening** + ADR: add the **scoped** `refs/changes/*` refspec (NOT
      `refs/*`) to `infra/gerrit/replication.config`, keeping `replicatePermissions = false` and
      excluding `refs/meta/*`; update the refspec table in `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md`; write the ADR
      superseding/amending **ADR-0010**; confirm the mirror-lock ruleset still bars non-replication
      writes to `main`.
- [ ] **S3 — g2p install** in the Gerrit **container**: extend the image (`FROM
      gerritcodereview/gerrit:3.14.1` + Python ≥3.11 + `pip install gerrit-to-platform`) so the
      in-container hook exec resolves its interpreter — host-side placement is rejected (the
      `hooks` plugin execs `$site/hooks/*` inside the container); enable the `hooks` +
      `replication` **core plugins** (from the war — no download/sha256; update
      `infra/gerrit/plugins/README.md`); at container start, symlink the three console-script hooks
      into the volume-mounted `$site/hooks/` pointing at the in-container g2p paths; write
      `gerrit_to_platform.ini` (PAT via the container-env path from Secrets) + `replication.config`
      symlink + `recheck → verify` mapping; write the ADR recording **g2p adoption** + the
      in-container runtime decision. **Coexistence proof (concrete):** push a test patchset and
      observe BOTH the review-bot webhook `LLM-Review` vote AND the g2p `workflow_dispatch` fire.
- [ ] **S4 — Service account + credentials:** provision the CI Gerrit service account via
      `infra/gerrit/service-user.sh` (account + group + `Verified` ACL); add the SSH key + PAT
      slots to **`ssm.tf`** and add the PAT leaf to **`fetch-secrets.sh`** (container-env path, per
      Secrets — no host-side materialization); set GitHub repo vars `GERRIT_SERVER` /
      `GERRIT_SSH_USER` / `GERRIT_KNOWN_HOSTS` / `GERRIT_URL` and secret `GERRIT_SSH_PRIVKEY`; write
      the ADR recording the **inbound GitHub→Gerrit SSH vote path** (blast radius, key scope,
      rotation/retire).
- [ ] **S5 — The workflow** `.github/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml`: the 3-job shape (`clear-vote`
      → `build-and-test` reusing `test.yml` steps via `checkout-gerrit-change-action` → `vote` off
      `WORKFLOW_CONCLUSION`), all actions **SHA-pinned**. `vote-type: clear` semantics are verified
      (Verified→0). Decide test.yml convergence (recommend the `gerrit-verify-manual-dispatch.yaml`
      hybrid so one file serves Gerrit dispatch + manual/branch runs).
- [ ] **S6 — Monitoring, back-out, E2E proof + docs:** add a **CloudWatch alarm** for g2p
      hook-dispatch failures and `Verified`-vote failures — detection modelled on
      `monitoring_s4b.tf` + `infra/scripts/observability.sh` (publish a metric from a journald log
      pattern, as `voter_errors` does; name the log source + pattern + metric). Document + test a
      **back-out** (disable the `Verified` submit requirement to restore single-vote gating). On the
      live Gerrit, prove red CI blocks submit, `recheck` re-runs, a green change with both votes
      submits + replicates; update `CONTRIBUTING.md` (two-vote flow + `recheck`); capture design
      notes (cost / latency budget, flaky-test handling, `copyCondition` re-run behavior). Record
      the change URL + votes.

## Deployment sequencing & risk
- **Ordering:** S2 (replication) + core plugins (S3) → S3/S4 (g2p + creds) → S5 (workflow) → prove
  the voter green → **only then** S1 activates the two-vote submit requirement (S6 E2E). Closes the
  "gate enforced but no voter exists" window (all submits blocked).
- **Failure surfacing:** g2p hook→`workflow_dispatch` failures (network / rate-limit / bad PAT)
  retry, then alert (S6) — never silently leave a change unvotable.
- **New file consumers (name in the child stories):** `infra/terraform/ssm.tf`,
  `infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh`, `infra/scripts/observability.sh`, `infra/gerrit/plugins/README.md`,
  `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md`.

## Decomposition
Six stories (S1–S6). S2 + core plugins are earliest; S3 depends on S2 + plugins; S4 pairs with S3;
S5 depends on S4 (creds); S6 (monitoring + back-out + E2E) gated on S1–S5; S1's submit-requirement
activation is deliberately last.

## Out of scope
- The `LLM-Review` vote itself (v1; epics d251 / b744).
- Per-vote HMAC signing of the CI verdict (decided: authenticated label vote only).
- Jenkins / Zuul self-hosted CI (rejected: over-weight for a single repo).
- GitLab support in g2p (not yet available upstream).

## Key references
- g2p: github.com/lfit/releng-gerrit_to_platform (README mandates full mirroring of change refs);
  docs.releng.linuxfoundation.org/projects/gerrit-to-platform.
- Real workflows: onap/.github + o-ran-sc/.github `gerrit-required-verify.yaml`; single-repo
  template `lfit/releng-gerrit_to_platform/examples/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml`.
- Actions (SHA-pin): `lfreleng-actions/checkout-gerrit-change-action`,
  `lfreleng-actions/gerrit-review-action` (`vote-type` verified), `im-open/workflow-conclusion`.
- GerriScary / CVE-2025-1568 — the copyCondition + reset rationale.
- Gerrit core-plugins doc (hooks/replication/webhooks bundled in the war).
- Local: `infra/gerrit/{project.config,replication.config,install-plugins.sh,service-user.sh,plugins/README.md}`,
  `infra/terraform/ssm.tf`, `infra/scripts/{fetch-secrets.sh,observability.sh}`, `monitoring_s4b.tf`,
  `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md`, ADR-0007/0010/0013/0014, `.github/workflows/test.yml`.
compiled_state.title: Add CI as a second Gerrit gate vote (Verified) via gerrit-to-platform -> GitHub Actions; require both LLM-Review and CI to pass
